# Check current state after MOUSE click
seg = current_frame.segmentation
from collections import Counter

n_count = sum(1 for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N')
print(f"Green blocks: {n_count}")

# Find remaining green block positions
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  N: ({min(rows)},{min(cols)})-({max(rows)},{max(cols)})")

# Check row 63
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
row63 = ascii_lines[63]
print(f"Row 63 p count: {row63.count('p')}")
</parameter>
</function>
